questionHtml: Deduce the strongest intermolecular forces that would occur between the following amino acid residues in a protein chain.
markschemeHtml:
Phenylalanine and valine:

London/dispersion/instantaneous induced dipole-induced dipole forces

OR

permanent dipole-induced dipole «interactions»

 

Glutamine and asparagine:

hydrogen bonds

 

Do not accept dipole-dipole interactions.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Deduce the strongest intermolecular forces that would occur between the following amino acid residues in a protein chain.
